## Inputs

| Name                                                                                                                  | Description                      | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Default | Required |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | :------: |
| <a name="input_codedeploy_app"></a> [codedeploy_app](#input_codedeploy_app)                                           | CodeDeploy Application 생성      | <pre>map(object({<br/> compute_platform = string<br/> name = string<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_codedeploy_deployment_config"></a> [codedeploy_deployment_config](#input_codedeploy_deployment_config) | CodeDeploy 배포 구성 생성        | <pre>map(object({<br/> deployment_config_name = string<br/> compute_platform = string<br/> traffic_routing_config = object({<br/> type = string<br/> time_based_canary = object({<br/> interval = number<br/> percentage = number<br/> })<br/> })<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_codedeploy_deployment_group"></a> [codedeploy_deployment_group](#input_codedeploy_deployment_group)    | CodeDeploy Deployment Group 생성 | <pre>map(object({<br/> app_name = string<br/> deployment_group_name = string<br/> deployment_config_name = string<br/><br/> auto_rollback_configuration = object({<br/> enabled = bool<br/> events = string<br/> })<br/><br/> blue_green_deployment_config = object({<br/> deployment_ready_option = object({<br/> action_on_timeout = string<br/> wait_time_in_minutes = number<br/> })<br/> terminate_blue_instances_on_deployment_success = object({<br/> action = string<br/> termination_wait_time_in_minutes = number<br/> })<br/> })<br/><br/> deployment_style = object({<br/> deployment_type = string<br/> deployment_option = string<br/> })<br/><br/> ecs_service = object({<br/> cluster_name = string<br/> service_name = string<br/> })<br/><br/> load_balancer_info = object({<br/> target_group_pair_info = object({<br/> prod_traffic_route = object({<br/> listener_arns = string<br/> })<br/> test_traffic_route = object({<br/> listener_arns = string<br/> })<br/> target_group = list(object({<br/> name = string<br/> }))<br/> })<br/> })<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre> | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_env"></a> [env](#input_env)                                                                            | AWS 개발 환경 설정               | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_project_name"></a> [project_name](#input_project_name)                                                 | 프로젝트 이름 설정               | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input_tags)                                                                         | 공통 태그 설정                   | `map(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a     |   yes    |
